shared_properties: The texture stays on the same ground lane as the 1200x2 baseline strip.
The palette stays monochrome and readable against the #F7F7F7 background.
The tile is built for seamless horizontal looping.
differences: The texture adds sparse pebbles and notches below the main baseline strip.
The texture height expands to 10px while the main line remains separate.
Opaque marks cover less than 45% of the tile so the lane stays visually minimal.

context.usage: Optional texture strip that adds motion detail under the ground line without changing collision height.

shape.silhouette: Low pebble texture band with sparse irregular marks under the main baseline.

acceptance_criteria: The left and right tile edges align without a visible seam when repeated horizontally.
Only #535353 and transparency appear in painted pixels.

reference_images.label: t_rex_runner_sprite_sheet_2x
reference_images.purpose: Grounds sky, cloud, and ground strip spacing that defines motion readability.

reference_images.label: t_rex_runner_sprite_sheet_1x
reference_images.purpose: Grounds sky, cloud, and ground strip spacing that defines motion readability.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteBundle with a single nearest-neighbor texture.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load through AssetServer in the Loading state and store the handle in a typed resource before gameplay starts.
runtime_notes: Snap transforms to whole pixels before render extraction.
Use visibility toggles or spawn pools instead of mutating image handles during active play.
Keep collider setup separate from the art bundle so gameplay forgiveness margins remain tunable.
